Target close: December 16, 2026

Project Overview
Workstream Status Timeline Notes
Kickoff + Listening In Progress Jun – Jul
Show Ways Forward Presentation Upcoming Jul – Aug
Brand Visual Identity + Guidelines Upcoming Aug – Sep
Vision Video (Motion Graphic, 2-min) Upcoming Aug – Nov
Website Upcoming Aug – Nov
2-Pager + Proposal Template Upcoming Sep – Nov
Project Close Upcoming Nov – Feb 2027
Key Milestones + Sign-Off Dates
Target Date Milestone Workstream Status Notes
Jun 25 – 26 Project Kickoff with Deana + LauraClient Meeting Kickoff + Listening ✓ Done
Jul 2 KNOW Interview 1 — Deana SpencerClient Meeting Kickoff + Listening ✓ Done
Jul 2 KNOW Interview 2 — Cheryl CollinsClient Meeting Kickoff + Listening ✓ Done
Jul 9 KNOW Interview 3 — Erika JacksonClient Meeting Kickoff + Listening Working on it
Jul 9 – 22 KNOW Interview 4 — Henry CervantesClient Meeting Kickoff + Listening Key Meeting
Jul 9 – 22 KNOW Interview 5 — TBDClient Meeting Kickoff + Listening Key Meeting
Jul 9 – 22 KNOW Interview 6 — TBDClient Meeting Kickoff + Listening Key Meeting
Jul 9 – 22 KNOW Interview 7 — TBDClient Meeting Kickoff + Listening Key Meeting
Jul 22 Listening Session on Visual Brand SystemClient Meeting Show Ways Forward Presentation Key Meeting Alignment on use cases for parent mark, sub-brands, and athletic badge. Come ready to discuss use-cases for these, and desires for the new system.
Jul 27 – 31 Direction summary email or meetingEmail Deliverable, Client Meeting Kickoff + Listening Upcoming
Aug 18 – 21 Show Ways Forward Presentation (Calibration 1)Client Meeting Show Ways Forward Presentation Key Meeting TOB presents narrative ideas and creative directions for the brand. No prep needed—feedback session follows separately.
Aug 24 Calibration Session — Receive Feedback + Drive toward DirectionClient Meeting Show Ways Forward Presentation Key Meeting Come prepared to discuss your feedback around the narrative ideas and creative directions presented in the previous meeting.
Aug 25 – 28 Gather Relevant Video Content Vision Video (Motion Graphic, 2-min) Upcoming We'll align on plan for sending any relevant footage, stock footage, photography, etc.
Aug 28 Website Kickoff Listening Session — Website Goals, Content, AudiencesClient Meeting Website Key Meeting Alignment on website goals, content strategy, and target audiences. We'll send questions in advance—please review them and come ready to discuss.
Sep 2 Listening Session — Video Goals, Story, Use CasesClient Meeting Vision Video (Motion Graphic, 2-min) Key Meeting Alignment on video goals, story direction, and use cases. We will send questions ahead of time. Please review and come prepared to discuss.
Sep 8 Presentation of Website Structure + Content StrategyClient Meeting Website Key Meeting TOB presentation of proposed site structure and content strategy. No prep needed—we'll look to confirm direction in the near term based on your feedback.
Sep 14 Approval Cycle of Brand PackageDecision Brand Visual Identity + Guidelines Upcoming
Sep 15 Deliver Final Brand PackageClient Review Brand Visual Identity + Guidelines Upcoming
Sep 15 Approval of Site Structure + NavigationDecision Website Upcoming
Sep 16 – 18 Copy Guidance Doc for HFM-Written PagesEmail Deliverable Website Upcoming
Sep 22 Present Script V1, Visual Treatments + Audio Mixes to ClientClient Meeting Vision Video (Motion Graphic, 2-min) Key Meeting TOB presentation of the script, audio mix, and visual treatment direction for the video. No prep needed—a separate calibration session follows for more deliberate feedback.
Sep 23 Present Homepage + Key Landing Pages to HFMClient Meeting Website Key Meeting TOB presents designed mockups for the homepage and key landing pages. A separate feedback session follows to drive toward directional sign-off.
Sep 24 Calibration Session — Script V1 + Visual Treatment FeedbackClient Meeting Vision Video (Motion Graphic, 2-min) Key Meeting Come prepared to discuss feedback on direction presented previously—In working toward approval of a script, and audio mix.
Sep 28 Calibration Session — Direction FeedbackClient Meeting Website Key Meeting Come prepared to discuss your feedback to the homepage and key page mockups in depth in driving toward directional approval to build these pages.
Oct 1 Content Hub Kickoff: Orientation to Content Process + Google Doc SetupClient Meeting Website Key Meeting We'll walk you through the content hub along with establishing Group Content Delivery Schedule for page groupings
Oct 1 Listening Session — Priorities, Audiences, Look + FeelClient Meeting 2-Pager + Proposal Template Key Meeting Alignment meeting—specific focus and questions sent prior to the meeting. Please review in advance and come ready to discuss.
Oct 7 Present Full Storyboards to ClientClient Meeting Vision Video (Motion Graphic, 2-min) Key Meeting TOB presentation of full storyboards built from the confirmed creative direction. No prep needed—a calibration session follows to gather deliberate feedback and move toward action.
Oct 12 Calibration Session — Storyboard FeedbackClient Meeting Vision Video (Motion Graphic, 2-min) Key Meeting Come prepared to discuss storyboard feedback—goal is align on feedback and work toward your sign off to begin building the video.
Oct 13 Present Built Homepage + 2 key pagesEmail Deliverable Website Upcoming We'll email the built homepage and two key pages. Please review before October 15th and prepare feedback to discuss together.
Oct 15 Calibration Session — Initial Build FeedbackClient Meeting Website Key Meeting Discussion of the initial homepage and key page build. Come ready to share your feedback. Goal is to align on what's working and what needs refinement, in turning toward building the rest of the site.
Oct 27 Present 2-Pager + Proposal TemplateEmail Deliverable 2-Pager + Proposal Template Upcoming TOB presents materials. Goal is to discuss initial feedback. No need to prepare anything for this meeting.
Oct 29 Presentation of Group 2 Page BuildsEmail Deliverable Website Upcoming We'll email the built group 2 pages. Please review before Nov 3 and prepare feedback to discuss together.
Oct 29 Calibration Session — Receive FeedbackClient Meeting 2-Pager + Proposal Template Key Meeting Come prepared to discuss feedback on materials presented previously—In working toward any revisions needed for completion + handoff of materials.
Nov 3 Calibration Session — Group 2 FeedbackClient Meeting Website Key Meeting Come ready to share your feedback on the status of the website. Goal is to align on what's working and what needs refinement.
Nov 4 Milestone: Present Full Video to ClientClient Meeting Vision Video (Motion Graphic, 2-min) Key Meeting TOB presents full video. Goal is to discuss initial reactions. No need to prepare anything for this meeting.
Nov 6 Deliver Final 2-Pager + Proposal TemplateEmail Deliverable 2-Pager + Proposal Template Upcoming
Nov 9 Calibration Session — Receive Feedback on VideoClient Meeting Vision Video (Motion Graphic, 2-min) Key Meeting Come prepared to discuss and align on specific feedback to the video and work toward any final revisions.
Nov 12 Present Full Website BuildEmail Deliverable Website Upcoming We'll email the full website build. Please review before Nov 16 and prepare feedback to discuss together.
Nov 16 Delivery of Final Video to Client (MP4)Client Meeting Vision Video (Motion Graphic, 2-min) Key Meeting
Nov 16 Calibration Session — Full Site FeedbackClient Meeting Website Key Meeting Come ready to share your feedback on the status of the website. Goal is to align on what's working and what needs refinement.
Nov 23 Launch Site LiveClient Work Website Upcoming
Nov 24 – 25 Webflow Training + Site HandoffClient Meeting Website Key Meeting A 1-hour training session to hand you the keys of the site.
Nov 24 Send Close EmailEmail Deliverable Project Close Upcoming

teamopenbook.com · Minneapolis, MN
